LanguageData.FFF_HeavyGears.label: supported body size
LanguageData.FFF_HeavyGears.description: Required pawn body size to equip this weapon.
LanguageData.FFF_MassCarryCapacity.label: mass carry capacity
LanguageData.FFF_MassCarryCapacity.description: The total mass this person can carry in their inventory and as equipment.
LanguageData.FFF_UsableWeapons.label: supported weapons
LanguageData.FFF_UsableWeapons.description: Usable weapons that are supported by the OS of this model.
